Leverage
every $1 federal invested
$69K → $449K
Every $1 of federal Wild & Scenic funding invested in the White Clay Creek watershed was matched with $5.51 in outside funding from landowners, grants, and in-kind contributions — turning $69,013 in federal investment into $449,318 in total on-the-ground watershed improvements.
